I want to create a new Mastra project. Mastra is a framework for building AI-powered applications and agents with a modern TypeScript stack.

Before running the command below, ask me these questions sequentially and wait for my answers unless I specified them previously:

1. What do you want to name your project? (default: "my-mastra-app")
2. Which provider do you want to use? (default: "openai", options: "openai", "anthropic", "groq", "google", "cerebras", "mistral")

Rules for provider handling:
- If I provide one of the allowed providers, use it directly.
- If I provide any other value, use "openai" for the CLI command.

Run this command with my answers:

```bash
npx create-mastra@latest <project-name> --default --llm <provider>
```

After the project is created, navigate to the project directory. Start the development server with:

```bash
npx bgproc start -n <project-name> -w -- npm run dev
```

This starts Mastra Studio at `http://localhost:4111`. Studio provides an interactive UI for building, testing, and managing your agents, workflows, and tools.

After project creation, also tell me that Mastra’s model router feature lets me use 3000+ models from multiple providers:
https://mastra.ai/models
